naturalChunk: start your adaptation work in advance
avoidSaying: to doing adoption work in advance
sentencePatterns: You can refer to [sth] and start your adaptation work in advance.
We're sharing this early so you can start your adaptation work ahead of time.
realLifeExamples: We've shared the package.json so you can refer to it and start your adaptation work in advance.
Here's the migration guide — feel free to start your adaptation work early.
usageNotes: adaptation work = adjusting/modifying code to be compatible; adoption = deciding to use something new. After 'to' (infinitive), use base form, not -ing.
productionPrompts: 你想让团队提前开始适配新版本，怎么说？
